[VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE] The exclusion of the untracked apps/api/tests/fixtures/llm/cover_letter/retry2.json from the fixture set is correctly justified: `git status`/`git log` confirm it is genuinely untracked (never committed to any branch), so it could not be the source of any leaked prod row, and its content independently overlaps real StoryEntry evidence per the module docstring — including it would reopen exactly the false-positive class this rework fixes.

The rework directly and precisely addresses both defects raised in my prior FAIL verdict: (1) the over-broad numeric fingerprint is replaced by long fixture-unique verbatim spans, independently proven not to collide with the real users' genuine story-bank evidence, and (2) the 4 wrongly-deleted real rows (including the submitted application) are restored byte-for-byte, with a new permanent test (test_restored_real_application_rows_present) guarding against recurrence of the exact over-deletion I caught.

reclassification.json's independent per-row classification (TRUE_FIXTURE vs REAL) exactly matches my own prior, independently-derived classification of all 8 ids — cross-checked again here from scratch against live prod data in this session, not merely re-read from the artifact.
